nasb.text: It happened when the ark of the covenant of the Lord came to the city of David, that Michal the daughter of Saul looked out of the window and saw King David leaping and celebrating; and she despised him in her heart.

esv.text: And as the ark of the covenant of the Lord came to the city of David, Michal the daughter of Saul looked out of the window and saw King David dancing and celebrating, and she despised him in her heart.

cnv.text: 耶和華的約櫃進了大衛城的時候，掃羅的女兒米甲從窗戶往下觀看，看見大衛王跳躍嬉笑，心裡就鄙視他。

ccb.text: 耶和华的约柜进大卫城的时候，扫罗的女儿米甲从窗户往外看，看见大卫王在兴高采烈地跳舞，心里就轻视他。
